main.description: The heartbeat of a world. Something happened. Attributed to a character, timestamped, permanent.

actorDID.description: The permanent identity of the person who took this action

worldReference.description: Reference to the world this action occurred in

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this action was taken

characterReference.description: Reference to the character who took this action

locationReference.description: Reference to the location where this action occurred

content.description: The content of the action — what happened

visibility.description: The visibility tier of this action

narrativeWeight.description: Optional importance scoring hook (null default, non-breaking)

parentAction.description: Reference to the action this is responding to (for threading)

eventReference.description: Reference to the event this action is part of
